## Spec-TDD checklist

- [ ] Spec written (`docs/specs/XX-feature.md`) before implementation
- [ ] Test cases enumerated (happy + edge + failure)
- [ ] Failing tests committed before implementation
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] Coverage gate met (>=80%)
